calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-02-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Ryan S. Walton, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Mariposa Gardens II Affordable Housing.
Garbo Chang, Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Domitila Gutierrez, Raymond Gonzales, Pablo Rodriguez, or Domitila Rodriguez.
Defaults were entered against defendants on March 24, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed March 20, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Mariposa Gardens II Affordable Housing, and against the Defaulted Defendants Domitila Gutierrez, Raymond Gonzales, Pablo Rodriguez and Domitila Rodriguez as follows:

Past Due Rent - $9,122.84.
Holdover Damages - 683.40.
Interest - $509.88.
Costs - $450.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $10,766.12.

Judgment signed in open court / Counsel to prepare Judgment.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-20-2009 Continued To Apr-02-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-27-2009 Continued To May-08-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
